title: Do not emit warnings about OCI runtime paths
body:
... before all user configuration files are merged.

This fixes #9389.

comments.body: @basilgello Not sure but I think change should go here https://github.com/containers/common/ and downstream vendor should be updated.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *basilgello* To complete the [pull request process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process), please ask for approval from **giuseppe** after the PR has been reviewed. The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Ok, makes sense! @flouthoc should I keep this PR open after I push the upstream one?
@basilgello Actually I am not aware about that @giuseppe can tell this better.

I closed this one after I looked at commit history on `vendor`. Only dependabot merges there, so closing this PR and letting @giuseppe and @rhatdan handle the upstream one :)

Thanks for the hint!
